bc.personalSub: Tell us about yourself. This information will appear on your public profile.
bc.photoSub: A professional photo builds trust with patients. JPG or PNG, max 5MB.
bc.pwdSub: Include numbers & symbols for a strong password.
bc.qualSub: Verify your credentials. We'll review your documents within 24 hours.
bc.dragDrop: Drag and drop your document here
bc.expSub: Help us match you with the right patients. Toggle on the areas where you have experience.
bc.expMinorSub: Experience drawing blood from infants, toddlers, and children under 14.
bc.expElderlySub: Experience with older patients who may have fragile veins or mobility limitations.
bc.expDiffSub: Experience with veins that are hard to locate or tend to roll during puncture.
bc.expObeseSub: Experience with patients where vein access may be more challenging due to body composition.
bc.whyMatterDesc: doctor practices flag recommendations that need specialized experience. Your experience profile helps our matching algorithm connect you with recommendations where your skills make a difference — and earns you more bookings.
bc.eqSub: Some tests require specific equipment. Let us know what you have available.
bc.eqCentSub: Required for serum separation. Some specialized labs require centrifuged samples.
bc.eqFreezSub: Required for sample storage when immediate transport isn't possible.
bc.eqAddPlaceholder: e.g., Blood gas analyzer, cold chain transport box...
bc.eqAddSub: Describe any other relevant equipment you have.
bc.areaSub: Define where and how you're available for blood collection.
bc.availPracSub: Patients can come to your location for blood draws.
bc.availHomeSub: You'll travel to the patient's location.
bc.baseAddSub: This is used to calculate distances for matching and travel fees.
bc.priceSub: Set your base fee. Travel costs are calculated automatically.
bc.calcSub: + €0.40/km automatically calculated by the platform based on the patient's distance from your base.
bc.earningsSub: Patients pay through the platform. You receive your fee minus the platform commission (default 17.5%) via credit note, settled bi-weekly. Your net earnings are always visible before you accept a recommendation.
bc.reviewSubBc: Review your profile before submitting for verification.
bc.reviewAfterSubmit: After submitting, our team will review your qualifications within
bc.reviewAfterSubmitP2: . You'll receive an email notification once your profile is approved and you can start receiving requests.

landing.heroTitle: The smarter way to manage blood collection
landing.heroSubtitle: Connect with verified phlebotomists in your area. Post recommendations, get matched, and manage appointments — all in one platform.

landing.testimonial1Quote: 99Tests has transformed how we handle decentralized blood collection. The reliability and professional standards are unmatched.
landing.testimonial2Quote: We reduced our patient wait times by 60% after switching to 99Tests. The matching algorithm finds the right collector every time.
landing.testimonial3Quote: As an independent [TODO] lab, 99Tests gave me the flexibility to set my own schedule while earning more than my previous position.
landing.testimonial4Quote: The platform's compliance features and documentation give us peace of mind. Every collection is tracked and verified end-to-end.
landing.hcSectionDesc: Upload patient recommendations, get matched with verified phlebotomists nearby, and track everything from booking to lab delivery.

footer.description: Professional blood collection logistics for doctor practices across Germany. Quality, compliance, reliability.

about.heroTitle: Building the infrastructure for on-demand healthcare staffing
about.heroSubtitle: 99Tests is a healthcare marketplace connecting companies with qualified phlebotomists — matching the right collector to every recommendation, everywhere.
about.missionQuote: "We believe every patient deserves timely, professional blood collection — and every [TODO] lab deserves fair access to work."
about.problemOldWayDesc: Blood collection is one of the most common medical procedures in the world. Yet the process of finding, booking, and managing phlebotomists remains fragmented, manual, and opaque. doctor practices waste hours coordinating with agencies. Phlebotomists lack direct access to opportunities. Patients have no visibility.
about.problemBuildingDesc: We are building the direct infrastructure connecting doctor practices with qualified, independent phlebotomists. Real-time matching, transparent scheduling, automated logistics, and a verified network of professionals setting their own rates. We're fixing this.
about.approach1Desc: We connect supply and demand directly. No middlemen inflating costs or reducing transparency.
about.approach2Desc: Every collector on our platform is identity-verified, credential-checked, and reviewed by the doctor practices they work with.
about.approach3Desc: Real-time matching, automated scheduling, secure payments, and full audit trails — built from the ground up for healthcare.
about.values1Desc: Everyone sees the same information. No hidden fees, no surprises.
about.values2Desc: We'd rather have fewer, better collectors than a large unvetted network.
about.values3Desc: Healthcare is complex enough. Our platform shouldn't be.
about.values4Desc: For healthcare workers' time, skills, and right to set their own terms.
about.partnersDesc: Companies trusting 99Tests for their blood collection needs.
about.ctaTitle: Join the future of healthcare staffing

forCompanies.heroSubtitle: Post a blood collection recommendation and get matched with verified, qualified collectors in your area. No phone calls, no agencies, no delays.
forCompanies.painSubtitle: Manual processes, endless phone calls, and lack of visibility are costing your operations time and money.
forCompanies.pain1Desc: Hours wasted calling agencies, waiting for callbacks, and negotiating rates for each recommendation.
forCompanies.pain2Desc: No standardized way to check qualifications, insurance, or experience before they show up.
forCompanies.pain3Desc: Once you hand off a recommendation, you have no idea what's happening until it's done — or not.
forCompanies.howSubtitle: A streamlined, end-to-end matching workflow designed specifically for modern doctor practices.
forCompanies.how1Desc: Create a blood collection recommendation in minutes. Add patient details, choose visit type, set urgency level.
forCompanies.how2Desc: Qualified, verified collectors in your area see your recommendation and apply with proposed time slots.
forCompanies.how3Desc: Review collector profiles, qualifications, and ratings. Shortlist or let your patient decide.
forCompanies.how4Desc: Real-time status updates from posting to completion. Every recommendation documented, every step tracked.
forCompanies.featuresSubtitle: Everything you need to manage decentralized blood collection confidently and reliably.
forCompanies.feature1Desc: Every collector is identity-verified and credential-checked before joining the network.
forCompanies.feature2Desc: Manage recommendations across multiple locations from a single centralized dashboard.
forCompanies.feature3Desc: GDPR-compliant data handling. Patient consent flows. Full audit trails.
forCompanies.feature4Desc: Know exactly where every recommendation stands. No more follow-up calls or emails.
forCompanies.feature5Desc: Choose your matching mode: patient decides, clinic shortlists, or clinic approves.
forCompanies.feature6Desc: Simple monthly invoicing. No per-transaction surprises. Transparent org fees.
forCompanies.ctaTitle: Ready to modernize your blood collection workflow?
forCompanies.ctaDesc: Join 250+ doctor practices already using 99Tests to streamline their logistics and save time.

forProfessionals.heroSubtitle: Join a growing network of qualified phlebotomists. Choose recommendations that fit your schedule, set your own fees, and get paid securely through the platform.
forProfessionals.benefitsSubtitle: Everything you need to build a flexible, rewarding phlebotomy practice.
forProfessionals.benefit1Desc: Choose your practice visit and home visit fees. No rate negotiations, no agency cuts.
forProfessionals.benefit2Desc: See available recommendations and apply for the ones that work for you. Propose your own time slots.
forProfessionals.benefit3Desc: Get paid directly through the platform after each completed collection. No chasing invoices.
forProfessionals.benefit4Desc: Earn reviews from patients and doctor practices. Your profile grows with every successful collection.
forProfessionals.howSubtitle: A simple, streamlined process designed to fit within your schedule seamlessly.
forProfessionals.how1Desc: See blood collection recommendations from doctor practices in your area. Filter by visit type, urgency, and location.
forProfessionals.how2Desc: Apply for recommendations you want. Propose 3 time slots that work for your schedule.
forProfessionals.how3Desc: Perform the collection. Payment is processed automatically. You receive your payout minus a small platform fee.
forProfessionals.testimonialQuote: 99Tests gave me the freedom to build my own practice. I choose my recommendations, set my hours, and get paid fairly. It's exactly what phlebotomy needed.
forProfessionals.earningsSubtitle: You set your rates. We handle the rest.
forProfessionals.earningsNote: Fees shown are examples. You set your own rates.
forProfessionals.reqsTitle: What you need to get started
forProfessionals.reqsSubtitle: A few simple prerequisites to ensure quality and safety on the platform.
forProfessionals.ctaTitle: Start earning on your own terms

howItWorks.heroTitle: From recommendation to collection in three steps
howItWorks.heroSubtitle: 99Tests connects doctor practices with qualified [TODO] labs through a simple, transparent matching process.
howItWorks.step1Desc: The clinic or organization creates a new request on the platform.
howItWorks.step1Bul2: Choose visit type and urgency level
howItWorks.step2Desc: Verified professionals in the area review and apply for the recommendation.
howItWorks.step2Bul1: Verified collectors see the recommendation in their dashboard
howItWorks.step2Bul2: Each collector proposes 3 specific time slots
howItWorks.step3Desc: The patient is empowered to choose the best option for their schedule.
howItWorks.step3Bul1: Patient receives a secure link — no account needed
howItWorks.step3Bul2: Reviews collector profiles, ratings, and proposed times
howItWorks.step3Bul3: Selects preferred collector and time slot
howItWorks.step4Desc: The professional performs the requested service securely.
howItWorks.step5Desc: Funds are distributed transparently and efficiently.
howItWorks.step5Bul1: Patient payment held securely during collection
howItWorks.step5Bul3: HC receives monthly invoice for org fees
howItWorks.step5Bul4: Full financial transparency for all parties
howItWorks.modesSubtitle: Choose the matching mode that fits your workflow.
howItWorks.mode1Desc: All qualified applicants are shown to the patient. They choose their preferred collector based on profiles, ratings, and proposed times.
howItWorks.mode2Desc: The doctor practice reviews applicants and creates a shortlist. The patient picks from the approved options.
howItWorks.mode3Desc: The doctor practice selects the collector directly. The patient is assigned their chosen professional.
howItWorks.trustSubtitle: Every step is designed for safety and compliance.
howItWorks.trust1Desc: Every collector's identity is verified before they can accept recommendations.
howItWorks.trust2Desc: Professional certifications and insurance are validated.
howItWorks.trust3Desc: Digital consent flows ensure proper authorization before every collection.
howItWorks.trust4Desc: Every action is logged. Complete transparency for compliance.
howItWorks.ctaHcDesc: Post recommendations and find qualified phlebotomists in your area instantly.
howItWorks.ctaBcDesc: Build your practice, set your rates, and choose your schedule.

pricing.heroSubtitle: No setup fees. No subscriptions. You only pay when blood collections happen.
pricing.bcCardNote: Free to join. Commission only on completed work.
pricing.patientSubtitle: Patient pricing is transparent and calculated at the time of booking.
pricing.patientNote: Patients see the total cost before confirming. No hidden fees.
pricing.faq1A: No. Creating an account is free for both doctor practices and [TODO] labs.
pricing.faq2Q: How does billing work for doctor practices?
pricing.faq2A: You receive a monthly invoice for all recommendations completed during the billing period. Payment terms are net 30.
pricing.faq3A: Payouts are processed after each completed collection. Funds are typically available within 2-3 business days.
pricing.faq4Q: Can I change my rates as a collector?
pricing.faq4A: Yes. You can update your practice visit and home visit fees at any time from your profile.
pricing.faq5A: No. You can use 99Tests for a single recommendation or hundreds. No contracts, no minimums.

contact.heroSubtitle: Have questions about 99Tests? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.successDesc: Thank you! We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.infoDesc: We're a Frankfurt-based team building the future of healthcare staffing.
contact.faq1A: Visit our registration page to create a free account as a doctor practice or [TODO] lab.
contact.faq2A: 99Tests currently operates across Germany. EU expansion is planned.
contact.faq3A: After registration, submit your credentials. Our team reviews and verifies within 1-2 business days.

faq.heroSubtitle: Everything you need to know about 99Tests.
faq.noQuestions: No questions found in this category.
faq.ctaSubtitle: Can't find the answer you're looking for? Please chat to our friendly team.

privacy.note: Note: This privacy policy is a template. Please review with legal counsel before publishing.
privacy.p1: 99Tests GmbH ("99Tests", "we", "us") operates the 99tests.com platform. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect your personal data in compliance with the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and the German Federal Data Protection Act (BDSG).
privacy.l3a: Account data: name, email, phone, company information
privacy.l3b: Patient data: name, date of birth, contact details (processed on behalf of doctor practices)
privacy.l3c: Professional data: qualifications, certifications, insurance details ([TODO] labs)
privacy.l3d: Usage data: IP addresses, browser type, pages visited, timestamps
privacy.l3e: Payment data: processed by our payment provider; we do not store full card details
privacy.l3f: Communication data: messages, notifications, support requests
privacy.l4e: Sending notifications about recommendations, appointments, and payments
privacy.l4f: Improving our services and user experience
privacy.l5a: Contract performance (Art. 6(1)(b)) — to provide our services
privacy.l5b: Legitimate interest (Art. 6(1)(f)) — for platform security and improvement
privacy.l5c: Legal obligation (Art. 6(1)(c)) — tax and regulatory compliance
privacy.p6: We share data with the following parties conditionally:
privacy.l6a: doctor practices and [TODO] labs (as necessary for recommendation matching)
privacy.l6c: Cloud infrastructure providers (Supabase/AWS for data hosting)
privacy.l6e: We do not sell your personal data
privacy.l7a: Account data: retained while your account is active, deleted within 30 days of closure
privacy.l7b: Patient data: retained per doctor practice instructions and applicable laws
privacy.l7c: Payment records: retained for 10 years (German tax law requirement)
privacy.p8a: Under the GDPR, you have the following rights over your personal data:
privacy.p9: We use essential cookies for platform functionality (authentication, language preferences). We do not use tracking or advertising cookies. See our Cookie Policy for details.
privacy.p10: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures including encryption in transit (TLS), encrypted storage, access controls, and regular security assessments.
privacy.p11: Your data is primarily stored within the EU (Frankfurt, Germany). Where data is processed outside the EU, we ensure adequate safeguards per GDPR Chapter V.
privacy.p12: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Material changes will be communicated via email or platform notification.

terms.note: Note: This Terms of Service page is a template. Please review with legal counsel before publishing.
terms.p1: By accessing or using the 99Tests platform (99tests.com), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, do not use the platform.
terms.p2: 99Tests is a marketplace platform that connects doctor practices with qualified [TODO] labs (phlebotomists) for venous blood sampling services. 99Tests facilitates the matching, scheduling, and payment process but is not itself a healthcare provider.
terms.l3a: You must provide accurate and complete registration information
terms.l3b: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account
terms.l3c: You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized access
terms.l3d: One account per person; accounts are non-transferable
terms.l4a: Provide accurate patient information for recommendation creation
terms.l4b: Ensure proper patient consent before creating recommendations
terms.l4c: Pay organization fees as invoiced monthly
terms.l5a: Maintain valid professional certifications and insurance
terms.l5b: Only accept recommendations within your qualifications
terms.l5c: Arrive at scheduled appointments on time
terms.l5d: Perform blood collection according to professional standards
terms.l5e: Report any incidents or complications promptly
terms.l6a: Patients access the platform via secure links provided by their doctor practice
terms.l6b: Patient consent is required before blood collection proceeds
terms.l6c: Patients may select their preferred collector and time slot (depending on matching mode)
terms.l6d: Payment is required before appointment confirmation
terms.l7a: doctor practices: monthly organization fees (€20/practice visit, €35/home visit)
terms.l7b: [TODO] labs: platform commission of 17.5% on completed collections
terms.l7c: Patient payments: processed at time of booking, held until collection completion
terms.l7d: All prices are in Euros and subject to applicable VAT (19%)
terms.l7e: Refund policy: see our Refund Policy section
terms.l8a: [TODO] labs must complete identity verification and credential checks
terms.l8b: 99Tests reserves the right to suspend or remove unverified or non-compliant users
terms.l8c: doctor practices and patients may leave reviews after completed collections
terms.l9a: recommendations may be cancelled before a collector is assigned at no charge
terms.l9b: Late cancellations may be subject to fees
terms.l9c: Refunds for completed services are handled on a recommendation-by-recommendation basis
terms.p10: All content, trademarks, and technology on the 99Tests platform are owned by 99Tests GmbH. Users may not copy, modify, or distribute platform content without written permission.
terms.l11a: 99Tests is a marketplace facilitator, not a healthcare provider
terms.l11b: We do not guarantee the availability of [TODO] labs
terms.l11c: We are not liable for the quality of blood collection services performed
terms.l11d: Our total liability is limited to the fees paid to 99Tests in the preceding 12 months
terms.p12: Your use of 99Tests is also governed by our Privacy Policy, available at 99tests.com/privacy.
terms.p13: We may update these Terms from time to time. Continued use of the platform after changes constitutes acceptance of the modified Terms.
terms.p14: These Terms are governed by the laws of the Federal Republic of Germany. The courts of Frankfurt am Main shall have exclusive jurisdiction.
terms.p15: 99Tests GmbH, Musterstraße 1, 60311 Frankfurt am Main. Email: legal@99tests.com

step0.desc: has arranged a blood collection for you. We just need a few things before we can finalize your appointment.
step0.footer: This process takes about 2 minutes. Your data is encrypted and protected under GDPR.

step1.title: Consent
step1.desc: Please review and agree to the following before we proceed.
step1.bloodDesc: I consent to venous blood sampling and understand the associated risks (minor bruising, discomfort at the puncture site, and in rare recommendations, dizziness).
step1.dataDesc: I agree that my personal data may be shared with the assigned [TODO] lab for the purpose of performing the blood draw.
step1.gdprDesc: I consent to the processing of my health data in accordance with GDPR for organizing this collection.

step2.title: Choose Your Collector
step2.desc: Your healthcare provider has pre-approved these professionals. Pick the one you prefer.
step2.waitingCounter: Waiting for {name} to respond to your suggested times...
step2.messageSent: Message sent to {name}. They will suggest new times soon.
step2.newTimes: New times available from {name} — please select one
step2.btnSuggest: None of these times work? Suggest your own →
step2.btnDontWork: These don't work either? Send a message →
step2.suggestPh: e.g. I work from home and am flexible +/- 1 hour.
step2.urgentWarning: For urgent recommendations, please select from available times or choose another collector.
step2.flexibleOpen: This collector is also open to other times

pathB.title: Request Sent!
pathB.desc: Your time request has been sent to
pathB.desc2: We'll notify you by email once they respond.
pathB.footer: You will complete the payment for your appointment only after {name} confirms the time.

step5.title: Payment
step5.desc: Complete your payment to confirm the appointment. Your payment is held securely in escrow until completion.

step6.title: How was your experience?
step6.successDesc: Your rating has been submitted. Your blood sample is being processed — your healthcare provider will receive the results directly.
